name: Rotel Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Rotel tomato with green chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 25 to 30 minutes at degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the white cornmeal, yellow cornmeal, flour, baking soda, and baking powder.
3. Add the melted vegetable shortening, buttermilk, beaten egg, finely chopped jalapeno, and Rotel tomato with green chili to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square pan.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
